title: Fresh by Brookshires
address: 5100 I-30, Fate, TX 75189, USA
description: Join us on the patio at FRESH by Brookshire's in Fate for a free Saturday evening of live music. The outdoor grill and patio area makes for a relaxed, family-friendly atmosphere right off I-30. Grab dinner from the patio grill, pick up a craft beer or glass of wine, and enjoy the show - no tickets needed. FRESH hosts live music every weekend on the patio, and it's become one of the go-to hangouts for the Rockwall, Heath, and Fate communities.

title: Frisco Rail Yard
address: 9040 First St, Frisco, TX 75034, USA
description: Live Radio DFW takes over the Frisco Rail Yard in Downtown Frisco's Rail District. This open-air food truck park is the perfect spot for a Saturday night out - rotating food trucks, a full bar, and plenty of room to spread out. Bring the crew (dogs welcome too) and grab a table or post up near the stage. No cover charge. The Rail District is walkable and worth exploring before and after the show.

title: Fresh by Brookshires
address: 5100 I-30, Fate, TX 75189, USA
description: We're back at FRESH by Brookshire's in Fate for another free evening of live music on the patio. Same great setup - outdoor grill, cold drinks, and a laid-back family-friendly vibe right off I-30. The patio grill serves food until 8:45 PM, and the wine and craft beer selection inside is worth browsing before you settle in. No tickets, no cover - just show up and enjoy the music.

title: Watters Creek
address: 970 Garden Park Dr, Allen, TX 75013, USA
description: Live Radio DFW joins the Concerts by the Creek series at Watters Creek Village in Allen. Bring a blanket or lawn chair and stake out a spot on the Village Green - the creek-side setting is one of the best outdoor music venues in Collin County. Restaurants surrounding the green offer patio dining if you'd rather grab a table. Free admission, family-friendly, and a great way to kick off a summer Saturday evening in North Allen.

title: Sweetwater Grill
address: 4884 TX-276, Royse City, TX 75189, USA
description: Catch Live Radio DFW on the outdoor stage at Sweetwater Grill, nestled between Royse City and Union Valley on Hwy 276. This locally owned grill and bar has one of the best back patios in the I-30 corridor - full bar, yard games, and plenty of space to enjoy a summer night of live music. The kitchen serves solid American comfort food, and the drinks are strong and affordable. No cover charge. A great night out for folks in Royse City, Rockwall, Heath, Fate, and the surrounding communities - about 30 minutes east of Dallas.

title: OG Cellars - 80s Dance Party
address: 704 Co Rd 1895, Sunset, TX 76270, USA
description: Live Radio DFW heads back to O G Cellars in Sunset, TX for a Saturday night 80s Dance Party. This boutique winery sits in the rolling hills of Northwest Wise County and pours 100% Texas wines, with an on-site pizzeria that'll be open through the show. Outdoor and indoor seating, OG wine, frozen drinks, and beer on site (no outside alcohol). Tickets are $25, and it's about an hour northwest of Fort Worth on Hwy 287 - a scenic drive out through the Hill-Country-feeling part of North Texas for fans in the DFW Metroplex, Decatur, Bowie, and Wichita Falls.

title: Fresh by Brookshires
address: 5100 I-30, Fate, TX 75189, USA
description: Live Radio DFW returns to FRESH by Brookshire's in Fate for another free Saturday evening show on the patio. Food, drinks, and great music - no tickets needed. If you haven't been to FRESH yet, it's more than a grocery store: craft beer, wine, a full patio grill, and live music every weekend. A perfect stop for the Rockwall, Heath, Fate, and Royse City crowd.

title: Private Event

title: Uptown Rail Brewery
address: 204 Bolivar St, Sanger TX 76266
description: Live Radio DFW heads to Uptown Rail Brewery in historic Downtown Sanger. This craft brewery has 30+ beers on tap, artisanal pizza, and a stage that puts you right in the action. About 45 minutes north of the Metroplex on I-35, it's worth the drive for the beer alone - add live music and you've got a full Saturday night. No cover charge. Weather permitting, the show moves to the outdoor stage. A fun night out for folks in Sanger, Denton, Lake Dallas, Corinth, and the I-35 corridor.
